claim: Deep Bridge's MAMMA MIA! tour runs from March 4, 2026 in Antwerpen, Gent and Hasselt with Maike Boerdam as Donna and Nathalie Meskens as Tanya; Capitole Gent dates April 18-19, 2026 are largely sold out.
quote: Mamma Mia! 2026 ... vanaf 4 maart 2026 ... Antwerpen, Gent en Hasselt ... Maike Boerdam (Donna), Nathalie Meskens (Tanya)

claim: Deep Bridge's new Flemish family musical Oliver Twist plays Capitole Gent November 6-8, 2026 then Stadsschouwburg Antwerpen from December 9, 2026, with Nordin De Moor as Fagin.
quote: Oliver Twist ... Capitole Gent vr 6 nov 2026, 19:00 ... tour 2026-2027 in Gent, Antwerpen en Hasselt

claim: The English-language rock-musical Evita - 50 Years, The Golden Jubilee has its Belgian premiere at Stadsschouwburg Antwerpen on November 13, 2026 with Vajèn van den Bosch as Eva Perón and a 30-piece orchestra.
quote: Belgische premiere ... vrijdag 13 november 2026 in Stadsschouwburg Antwerpen ... Vajèn van den Bosch (Eva Perón) en Milan van Waardenburg (Ché)

claim: Studio 100 SingAlong in Symphony with Symfonieorkest Vlaanderen plays AFAS Dome Merksem (Antwerpen) on December 3-4, 2026 to celebrate 30 years of Studio 100.
quote: Studio 100 SingAlong in Symphony ... AFAS Dome ... 3 en 4 december 2026 ... Symfonieorkest Vlaanderen

claim: Wim Helsen's cabaret show Welkom Ongemak tours Flanders heavily in May-October 2026 including Leuven (15-16 May), and a Belgian autumn run in Dilbeek (24/9), Geel (25/9), Beveren (30/9), Waregem (2/10), Strombeek (8-10/10) and Roeselare (22/10).
quote: 15/05: 30CC/Schouwburg, Leuven ... 24/09: cc Westrand, Dilbeek ... 08/10: cc, Strombeek ... 22/10: De Spil, Roeselare

claim: Alex Agnew performs his new show 'No More Heroes' at AFAS Dome Antwerpen on October 8-10, 2026, tickets €45-65.
quote: ALEX AGNEW @ AFAS Dome - Antwerpen, Belgium - Oct 09, 2026 ... 8, 9 en 10 oktober 2026

claim: Jens Dendoncker tours his theater show 'Over de Romantiek' through Flemish cultural centres in early 2026 with Hasselt on May 13, 2026 as a notable late-spring date near Ghent.
quote: Jens Dendoncker - Over de Romantiek - C.C. Hasselt, Hasselt - woensdag 13 mei 2026

claim: William Boeva tours new show 'Drift' (and continuing show '13'); Drift performed at Zaal Lux Kapellen on December 23, 2026.
Philippe Geubels and Bart Cannaerts run a joint try-out tour with new material in 2026; one date is Hamont-Achel on May 28, 2026.
quote: Philippe Geubels & Bart Cannaerts - DUBBELE TRY-OUT (UITVERKOCHT) ... donderdag 28 mei 2026 ... Hamont-Achel

claim: Trixxo Theater Hasselt programs the Vlaamse sprookjesmusical 'Roodkapje' from May 2, 2026 (also touring Stadsschouwburg Antwerpen May 17 and Capitole Gent May 25, 2026), plus Bart De Pauw in November 2026 and Helmut Lotti Goes Classic in December 2026.
quote: Roodkapje in 2026 Vlaamse Sprookjesmusical in Trixxo Theater (Hasselt) ... Bart De Pauw (November 2026) ... Helmut Lotti Goes Classic (December 2026)

claim: Stadsschouwburg Antwerpen hosts a stand-up cluster in May-June 2026: Urbanus 'Bes Tof' (May 14), Wouter Deprez 'Wouter moet meer orde hebben!' (May 16), Matteo Lane (May 21) and Bassem Youssef 'Belly of the Beast Tour' (June 21); Laura Ramoso 'The Calm Down Tour' plays Koningin Elisabethzaal on May 14, 2026.
quote: Laura Ramoso: The Calm Down Tour ... 14 mei 2026 ... Koningin Elisabethzaal ... Urbanus 'Bes Tof' ... Matteo Lane ... Bassem Youssef ... Stadsschouwburg Antwerpen
